player_notes.anthony edwards: Edwards is OUT for multiple weeks with a bone bruise and hyperextension in his left knee — effectively eliminated from the playoffs. Do not play any Edwards props.
player_notes.donte divincenzo: DiVincenzo suffered a torn right Achilles tendon in Game 4 and is out for the remainder of the playoffs. Absence boosts usage for remaining Timberwolves players.
player_notes.kevin durant: Durant missed Game 4 with a bone bruise/sprained left ankle. His availability for Game 5 is uncertain — monitor status closely before playing any props.
player_notes.victor wembanyama: Wembanyama returned from concussion protocol and played full Game 4 (27 pts, 11 reb, 7 blk). No minutes restriction apparent; props fully in play for Game 5.
player_notes.joel embiid: Embiid returned from appendectomy in Game 4. Monitor workload/minutes restriction closely as he is likely on a ramp-up after missing time.
player_notes.ayo dosunmu: Scored 43 points in Game 4 with Edwards and DiVincenzo both out. With both injuries confirmed as serious, Dosunmu's role and usage are significantly elevated going forward.
player_notes.lebron james: LeBron had 10 points and 8 turnovers in Game 4 blowout loss. Series now 3-1 against Rockets with Game 5 upcoming; monitor if any injury concerns emerge.
player_notes.payton pritchard: Hit 6 threes and scored 32 points in Game 4 vs. 76ers. Active 3PT prop target in a favorable matchup with Boston leading 3-1.

game_notes.HOU vs LAL: Kevin Durant (ankle bone bruise) missed Game 4 and his Game 5 status is uncertain. If Durant is out again, expect elevated usage for Amen Thompson, Tari Eason, and Alperen Sengun.
game_notes.MIN vs DEN: Anthony Edwards (knee, out weeks) and Donte DiVincenzo (torn Achilles, season over) are both out for the Timberwolves. Dosunmu, Julius Randle, and Jaden McDaniels see boosted roles.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: G4: Left game with a LEFT knee injury after only 18 min (5 pts, 1-8 FG); did not return; severity unclear with testing underway postgame. Now listed QUES per injury report. Treat as a primary injury concern for G5; availability and minutes are now the most critical variables in the DEN-MIN series. Do not assume any baseline minutes until cleared.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms Edwards has a bone bruise and hyperextension in his left knee and is expected to miss multiple weeks. This is no longer 'severity unclear' — he is definitively OUT for an extended period, not merely questionable. A separate news item also mentions Donte DiVincenzo suffered a torn right Achilles tendon in G4.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Edwards' status to OUT (multiple weeks, bone bruise + hyperextension, left knee) — effectively season-ending for the remainder of this series and likely beyond. Add Donte DiVincenzo to the season-ending absences or injury landscape as he suffered a torn right Achilles in G4 (not currently mentioned anywhere in the context doc).

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: Durant's ankle status (still QUES) remains the decisive series variable... G4 key references Durant as 'still QUES' for ankle.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news confirms Durant was officially diagnosed with a bone bruise in his sprained LEFT ankle (news item: 'Kevin Durant, who was diagnosed with a bone bruise in his sprained left ankle after further testing, will miss Game 4'). The context doc references a 'right knee contusion' from practice Apr 16 earlier in the injury landscape section, and later describes his ankle as the injury. The confirmed diagnosis is now a bone bruise in the left ankle, and he missed G4. His status for G5 remains uncertain but the injury is more specifically defined than 'QUES ankle.'
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Update Durant's injury description to 'bone bruise, left ankle (confirmed diagnosis)' — replace vague 'ankle QUES' language. Also reconcile the earlier 'right knee contusion' reference in the LAL-HOU pre-series section with the actual ankle injury that kept him out of G2-G4. His G5 availability for a potential series-closing game remains the key variable.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: G4 (Apr 26): 27/12/3 (9-17 FG, 1 3PM, 34 min) — full load, no visible restriction, rim deterrence fully restored. Right ankle pain still noted but did not limit his G4 performance.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news reports Wembanyama had 27 points, 11 rebounds (not 12) and seven blocks in G4. The context doc states 12 rebounds; the news article says 11 rebounds. Minor stat discrepancy.
suggested_context_updates.suggested_action: Verify and correct Wembanyama's G4 rebound total — news reports 11 rebounds while context doc states 12. Update the series diary and injury note accordingly.

suggested_context_updates.current_context_fact: DiVincenzo is not mentioned anywhere in the season context document's injury landscape or player notes.
suggested_context_updates.conflict: Today's news reports DiVincenzo suffered a torn right Achilles tendon in G4 of the DEN-MIN series. This is a season-ending injury to a MIN rotation player that is entirely absent from the context doc.

Note his role in MIN's rotation and the compounding effect alongside Edwards' multi-week absence — MIN's backcourt depth is now severely depleted heading into G5.
